titles.en: Punishment of intention of a sin
Punishment of intention of a sin

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُکَیْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَیَنْوِی الذَّنْبَ فَیُحْرَمُ رِزْقَهُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُکَیْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَیَنْوِی الذَّنْبَ فَیُحْرَمُ رِزْقَهُ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ja’far b. Muhammad from Abdillah b. Bukayr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Surely whenever a believer intends to commit a sin, he is deprived of his sustenance.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ja’far b. Muhammad from Abdillah b. Bukayr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Surely whenever a believer intends to commit a sin, he is deprived of his sustenance.”
